# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - notify

notify_merge_request:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - echo "Merge Request Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Merge Request Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - git commit --amend -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - git tag -a "deploy/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" -m "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - merge_requests
